This game is by far one of the funnest games I've played yet. With many AAA and indie soccer games out there, this company opted for a rare twist. Quick games, decent customization, and fantastic blend between laid-back/competitive game play. It does have its drawbacks, however, including gameplay glitches and server issues.

You boot up into quick play, and immediately load into a game where its 6 minutes long. Once that's over, you get to boot up again; these are fast enjoyable games. No long loading screens, no time to doom scroll, and better yet, very enjoyable to play with friends. You'll play 5-7 games, maybe more, in about 1 hour. 

Customization is not extensive, but just enough to introduce some individuality to every player in the game. With different hairstyles, face options, and accessories to equip, your player can come out into the pitch and separate themselves from the rest.

Competitive, competitive, competitive. That is the rage nowadays in tandem with single player RPGs. This game will scratch the rocket league itch without requiring a billion neurons firing at the same time to beat someone above gold. If you know your soccer basics, youll excell. If you dont, not as much, but still just as fun.

Now the issues:
There is server lag, some games you'll experience it, others you will not. There are some glitches in game that can affect your ability to play the game, does not happen often, but when it does it can feel frustrating.

Those are some of the issues I've noticed, but the gameplay itself is something new, fresh, and exciting in its own way.

For $30 in this age of $70 games, it is a great deal and well worth your time.

■■■■ 철저하게 미완성된 게임 & 그냥 강진축구 시즌2 ■■■■
★★ 생전 처음 써보는 분노의 리뷰 ★★
★★ 고혈압 있으신 분들 플레이 금지 ★★

● 선요약 : 3D 강진축구 + 10명에서 하는 공튀기기 게임

🎮 개발진이 축구 게임에 대한 이해도가 1도 없음
- 축구 게임으로서 기본적인 시스템조차 구현 안됨
- 공 근처에 가도 소유권이 안 옴
- ★ 패스를 하면 동료 방향으로 가야 하는데 전혀 그렇지 않음 (매우 치명적)
- 공을 몰고 달리면 소유권이 튀어 나가버려서 ‘치달’조차 불가능
- 그냥 공이 엉뚱한 곳으로 날아감
...글로 적어서 그렇지 체감해보면 와 미친? 이라는 생각이 자꾸 들거임
축구게임인데 패스가 진짜 절망적임

🕹️ 조작감 최악
- 프리스타일 풋볼보다 못함
- 특히 패스 조작감은 재앙 수준
- 차라리 슈팅으로 패스하는 게 더 정확함
- 시점과 슈팅 방향이 동일해서, 패스 받고 바로 슈팅하는게 불가능함
(진짜 답답함. 패스받고, 시점 돌려서 골대에 영점 조절하고 감아차기 까지 정해야함.)

🧠 축구 게임에 대한 이해 부족
- 개인 플레이만 유도하는 물리엔진과 패스 정확도
- 골키퍼 다이빙도 조잡 (어려운 건 잘 막고 쉬운 건 못막음)
- 팀워크 기반 플레이는 불가능
- 결국엔 개태클 + 공 튀기기 게임 + 뽀록골만 남음
- 맘에 안 들면 그냥 나갈 수 있음 (남은 팀원들만 멘붕)

❌ 매칭, 튕김, 욕설
- 동접자 9만인데도 매칭 안 됨 (심지어 3:2로 시작하는 경우도 잦음)
- 너무 자주 튕김. 랭킹전 하는데도 팀원들 자꾸 튕겨서 몰입이 안됨 
- 패스 실패가 잦아 팀원 간 욕설 난무 (보이스 절대 켜지마세요 차오니마 바로 날아옵니다)

😤 총평
- 축구 게임 팬으로서 굉장히 불쾌한 경험
- 방향성은 좋았지만 너무 미완성
- 이걸 유료로 판다는 건 소비자 기만

그래도 이런 시도를 해줘서 고맙긴 함
이걸 반면교사 삼아, 다른 축구 게임 개발사들이 더 잘 만들어주길 바랍니다.

What I like:
The gameplay is lots of fun when it is working, the gameplay is much different than any 2K or other sports games out there. I love to see the developers change up the formula for any game and makes it more skill based/competitive. It feels great when you have a solid team actually working together to make a goal or defend against the opponents attacks. 

What I don't like:
Lots of bugs are apparent. The hotfixes do seem to help with some of the issues present on launch. I still see bugs where the ball is on the wrong side, desync issues including shooting, tackling, or anything where two players collide with the ball, generall ui issues including leveling showing I am still level 0 and not being able to cancel a match when waiting for over 20 seconds and forced into the match. This is just my assumption, but I feel as if people who are lagging have an advantage at times not being able to predict their movement and animation timing is off in general. The goal keeping has been mostly fixed, but there is still times where the ball should have be defended going straight through players including defenders on the field. People are still kind of abusing keeping the ball in possession and in the air, but some of those issues have been addressed. Server issues include matchmaking where the lobby is forced into a 2v3 pretty often instead of just cancelling the match or finding 1 more player. Also, goalkeepers in this game are an issue as well. Most the time they will just up and exit the goal leaving the goal wide open and the second the enemy gets the ball kicks it into the goal. Most of my time I am playing goalie because my other teammates straight up don't try, give up, or leave the goal open so they can play striker. There are games where I am goalie for the whole 6+ minutes because both teams suck so bad they can't make a goal, 99% of the time because they refuse to work together and do selfish actions listed below. No repercussions allows for all of this behavior. I luckily only had 2 crashes within my time playing, but still are present.

Selfish Jerks Issue:
I will say with my 17 (+24 from beta) hours of playing, I would say 80% of the time I am encountering players who believe they are the next messi or the next egoist. But, partially my fault because I mainly play 3v3 in this game because I believe it is more intimate and tense (Please bring 3v3 ranked). They will ball hog the whole time, shoot the worst possible shots, and get the ball stolen from them so many times I am permanently playing defense both goal keeping and defending. When they don't get their way they rage quit, help the opponent, intentionally try to take the ball from teammates, shoots in the own goal, and others... With no reporting system of any kind, once again, this behavior is allowed. 

Conclusion:
With this all in mind, if you have a group of friends or wanting to play this game with the mindset of being a fair, well optimized, and competitive, you will be disappointed most of the time you play to be honest. I played since the beta and many issues haven't still been addressed, but they are patching and fixing the issues as of right now. Playing sifu and how much love and care is there shows that the developers care and will hopefully update and fix all these issues. Don't get me wrong, this is a great game, but in its current state needs some fleshing out to do. These competitive games should encourage fairness, equal playing field with no "pay to win" microtransactions, and can get better at with time/effort. 

TLDR:
Playing with randos, you're asking for pain 80% of the time. Lots of bugs still present. Overall, still a fun game with great potential with friends or decent randos.

I used to love playing with my mates in organized or pick-up settings. Now that I live far away, I don't have that luxury anymore. This game has brought that feeling back. Whenever we all have time in the evenings, we get on, and it feels like I'm 10 years younger and back home. 

Your style and football IQ comes out as with every movement, position, challenge, and distribution/shot. The fact that this game facilitates that connection between player and character is unique. This game has many parallels to actual sport in that, you need to have sharp decision making, achieve mastery in muscle memory, perform under pressure, and cooperate with teammates to achieve success. Once a player has all of those ingredients, they can pull off plays that they remember watching on tv or back when they were players. 

I am very excited for the future of this game and of the revelations we as a player base will discover as we continue to compete and enjoy on the field. Merci beaucoup Sloclap, you have created a masterpiece in progress!

[b][h1]Rematch – Um jogo de futebol arcade que vale cada partida![/h1][/b]

[b]Jogo incrível![/b] Rematch chegou chutando a porta e entregando uma jogabilidade [i]renovadora[/i], diferente de tudo que tem por aí.
Quem curte desafio e mecânica bem feita vai pirar.
O estúdio claramente gosta de ousar (só lembrar do [i]Sifu[/i], né?). Aqui eles acertaram de novo!

[hr][/hr]

[b]Se você tem noção de futebol e visão de jogo, vai se dar MUITO bem.[/b]
Não é só sair correndo atrás da bola não, tem que pensar, saber se posicionar, aprender a usar as paredes, fazer tabela...
E isso vem com o tempo.

Quando você domina o controle e entende a maldade das jogadas, já dá pra montar time e sair quebrando todo mundo online.
[b]E sério!![/b] Quando se joga com amigos que também manjam, a experiência fica [i]surreal[/i].

[hr][/hr]

[b]Rematch me trouxe aquela alegria que eu perdi nos FIFAs depois de 2021.[/b]
Lembra muito o [i]FIFA Street[/i], só que com mais liberdade e criatividade.
É estiloso, rápido, divertido e viciante.
Um verdadeiro achado pra quem tava cansado do mais do mesmo.

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Resumo:[/h2]
Se você quer um jogo de futebol com pegada arcade, cheio de mobilidade, jogadas estilosas e que te faça dar risada e vibrar com os amigos, [b]vai de Rematch sem pensar duas vezes.[/b]
[i]Aqui a resenha é garantida![/i]

[hr][/hr]

[h2]Observação:[/h2]
Vi algumas análises apontando travamentos, bugs e problemas nos servidores — mas comigo foi o oposto.
[b]Tudo está rodando liso,[/b] igualzinho às outras duas betas que joguei.

[b]Não tive crash nenhum, nem bug grave.[/b] Em umas 10 partidas, no máximo 2 ou 3 tinham algum jogador lagado — e mesmo assim, nada que quebrasse a experiência.
O jogo está estável, bonito e com uma gameplay muito acima da média pro gênero.

[b]Ou seja, minha experiência tá sendo extremamente positiva.[/b] Talvez esses problemas estejam acontecendo de forma isolada, então vale a pena testar com mente aberta.

Unfortunately the game is content dry and missing key features months after launch. What started out as a huge launch day success has quickly seen a huge loss in players, and the developers seem to be less focused on this title than players would like, maybe even cashing in on the launch success and calling it a day. 

- Player quits your team seconds into a match? Tough, you have to play it out, and if you lose the game, no elo protection. You lose elo even though the match was clearly unfair from the first minute. 

- Want to tell a player that there's a man behind them? Nope. No "Man-on" callout, months after it has been requested. 

- No new game modes since launch. You either play ranked 5v5 or casual 3v3 - 5v5. Why no ranked 3v3/4v4? What about a casual 2v2 or head to head mode? Easy stuff to add, but yet nowhere in sight. 

It's a shame, the game at it's core is fun, but I now find myself playing for 20 minutes and getting bored, then logging off for the day. It needs more to keep player retention.

Edit:
After 6 months from release game is still in bad place. Every bug they fix every exploit they remove another 2 reappears. Game was never in a good shape since the launch.
The game crashes my high end pc, every other game somebody disconnects for no reason. Half of the time game ends with ball getting stuck ( its a bug from beta days anytime they say they fixed it, it reappears some other time). Networking is improved but still very far from optimal for a online game. Ball priority is a gamble. Game screws you a lot by not processing your input. A lot of desync happens even with 20ms. These are just what comes to my mind atm.

It’s clear that the development team is incapable of maintaining a fully online game. Please sell the IP and go back to making single player games.
Hay mucho Desync en algunos partidos, los servidores con lag (Al menos en LATAM). Cuando arreglen esto cambiaré la valoración.

Si sumamos el lag y desync (Te obliga a tener que adivinar hacia donde saldra la bola, y te quita parte del poco tiempo de reaccion que tienes)
La mala camara (¿Solo 90 de fov? incluso para el portero!!?? ¿No puedo fijar el balon de forma comoda?)
Y las injustas mecanicas del ataque sobre los pobres dos botones que tiene la defensa para poder protegerse (La defensa solo puede saltar o barrer... El ataque puede usar la pared de arco, levantar la pelota, darle efecto curvo, gambetear, pases aereos, fakeshots, pegarle de chilena solo haciendo click, etc, etc, etc.) 
El juego se basa en correr hacia delante con dos delanteros que sepan coordinar 2 pases, y es gol 99%
Si te quitan el balon, rezar porque el arquero por milagro adivine que piensa hacer el oponente, de entre los 20 inputs que puede llegar a realizar, y luego de eso, que el juego se digne a parar el balon, en lugar de atravesar al defensa/portero

En otras palabras, el juego se vende como "competitivo", pero debido a su desbalance y mala conexion a sus servidores, esta lejos de ser un competitivo decente, por tanto, hasta que no mejoren estos aspectos, o por lo menos la camara y los servidores, es un reembolso de manual.

For me, it's not fun because 90% of the players in the game are greedy. That's the main problem — it makes the game unenjoyable.
It would be much better if we had bots on our team instead. That way, you'd be facing real players with their own bots, which would make the game more fun and give you more chances to actually play. Right now, you're mostly just running around and waiting for a pass that never comes, because someone thinks they're a god and tries to do everything solo — or they only pass to their friend.
But when you get the ball, they just spam you to pass it.
That's just my perspective and how I feel. Not everyone may agree, but anyway — good luck, and have fun if you can. 🙂

There may be potential for this game but it's impossible to see past the sea of network bugs, microtransactions, and griefers. I already paid for the game, yet still trying to get me to fork out for the lackluster battle pass, and overpriced shop transactions?

It's probably telling it's launch day, with a front-page steam ad and there don't appear to be enough people playing to queue for anything other than 3v3, even though the flagship mode seems to be 5v5.

It is unfathomable an online, multiplayer, team-based game would launch in 2025 lacking a behavior system or at least basic reporting functionality. No, redirecting to built-in steam reporting is not acceptable.

Instead, there is plenty of infrastructure coded out for monetization through the shop, which speaks volumes about where the focus will be for this title -- microtransactional profits will take precedence over competitive integrity and fairness.

Fun game to play with a group of friends but the servers are some of the worst I've ever played on, half the games are unplayable because of lag and skipping. The devs should not be focusing on anything but fixing the servers. Every game there is one player from the team that has one of the glitches listed below causing them to have to quit the game and load back into the match, leaving the team at a disadvantage then they force you to add your disconnected teammate back into the lobby the next game with the inability to stop the matchmaking queue. Very poor job taking care of their game on launch and months into the game after launch. Cheaters are everywhere speed hacking in the game and will never be penalized, looks like the devs spent little time on anti-cheat. This feels like a pre-pre alpha game. Servers get worse by the day.

Players/ball transporting around the map, 50/50 on if your player controls the ball or if it goes through your player. Randomly get a glitch where you can't touch the ball and the goalie can't pick it up. Another glitch where the ball stays stuck in the ground even with the whole lobby surrounding it. The ball often goes right back to ball carrier after being poked away without them losing stride or control of the ball, defying all laws of movement and momentum that are important for this game to be successful.

The goalie mechanics are probably the worst thing I've ever seen in a game, catch it sometimes but not others, goalies randomly catch the ball with the back of their head after missing it on the initial shot, sliding, jumping and catching all feel very stiff and unpredictable. You tap Y to just jump up and get the ball, goalie never locks onto it, the slide move for the balls on the ground is very slow and has a terrible animation. There is a bug where your goalie lays on top of the ball while the timer is running down, automatically drops it and gets it stolen. No one in the game wants to play keeper because it is so poorly implemented and feels terrible. Honestly, not sure I've ever seen such a terrible attempt to implement something in a game. And the same person is designated to goalie every game, no picking roles, no random selection.

Way too many inconsistent touches and deflections. You can be standing in front of someone, right on top of the ball and not deflect it but someone who is on the ground from a missed slide tackle or missed goalie dive can deflect the ball in the air or catch a shot. The priority the offensive player gets in the box needs to adjusted, the priority should go to the player in the best position. Often times the offensive player will lock on to ball even when behind defender because they clicked boost. The spamming of defensive dribbling needs to be patched and the priority someone gets for self passing needs to be changed, all reasons why no one wants to play defense (I found a perfect example on a thread). This defender is in a better position than the offensive player, the ball would have to travel past the defender to get to the offensive player, yet it goes past the defender who is in a motion to clear the ball while the offensive player is charging up an animation through the defender's body. Boost or no boost, the positioning should get priority, there is a bit too much emphasis on 'extra effort'. Could be server/latency delay but shouldn't be happening. The self-passing priority and travel distance needs to be totally redone and modified.

https://www.reddit.com/r/Rematch/comments/1lkzjns/better_ways_to_defend_in_this_situation/

Very bad ranked matchmaking system - Queues you up in ranked matches 4v5, doesn't give you a fill player, and counts it as a ranked loss, no punishment for quitting games early, very uneven balancing of teams, will get the same guy for three straight games that won't pass and/or will try to score on own goal because they are upset about how the game is going. Need a better ranked and reporting system to encourage players to play without their full 5 stack, playing with randoms is terrible and will stay that way as long as they are never punished for ruining games on purpose.

Assuming the devs can lock in and fix a lot of the issues plaguing this game I can recommend it. Now if that changes at any point my review will change. 

I played the beta and the improvement in how the game felt over the course of two weeks was incredible, so for those thinking it wont get better that is BEYOND un-true and do not listen to that. If you like me, played football (soccer) growing up and loved the sport and wanted a way to get back into the sport this game is incredible and almost a one to one and the walls while some people complain cause issues allow for a more interesting and fast paced environment that doesn't require tons of paused time for throw ins. This game is genuinely one of the best soccer games to be released ever and the thrill of properly doing a good play through passing is not matched by any other soccer game. Now just like any other game the people who play the game aren't always the best but all games have that same issue.

Time for the pain points. The game has a lot of really frustrating bugs along with strange detection issues. From reading the patch notes the whole thing seems like it is related to server and desync issues which patch by patch are being routinely fixed so please give the devs some time to fix all of it. On their current pace they should all be gone in a few months or so. the ranking system can be a frustration for some with the promotion matches but as well as that once you achieve a rank you don't go down anymore. Some can consider that a plus and a minus depending on who you are and I feel like it needs to be pointed out. The game also has a lot of control issues to fix as mouse and keyboard controls currently also have a lock on feature that aim points but console has no access to that along with the ball lock feature being disabled by default and is very strange in how all the controls feel. With time I am unsure what will happen with that but I am praying it is a good fix. 

Finally, the biggest con in my honest opinion, no cross play regardless of the fact that it was a marketing point for them. The date of release for that is undecided and unknown and as such if that is a major point for you to play with your console friends or even game pass friends do not buy it yet. You will have to wait for them to implement some sort of system to allow for queues to be shared. for now, gamepass and windows store players are with xbox, playstation is by itself and steam is by itself. The servers are also having issues with queue times so if you wait 20+ minutes, do not worry, its not you the servers are just overloaded most likely and cannot reliably find a match.

All in all the game is, in my opinion, incredible and honestly if you love football is one of the best experiences you could possibly get for a close one to one with the sport in a non convoluted controls way unlike other games that have done it on pc with really difficult to get used to controls. If all your friends are playing on steam or you want to play alone the game is worth it otherwise, wait for the crossplay release when not only will there be more players the game will be more populated and queue times are faster.

Rematch has a really fun concept and it is clear that Sloclap drew inspiration from Rocket League, which works well for what's at the core of this game, but the game is in a really rough shape at the moment.

I neither know how long it's been in development for nor why they decided to release it now, I played 2 of the betas prior to launch as well as advanced access on 3 days ahead of the launch. During both betas I found myself thinking very clearly that the game is in a rough shape, hoping it's just the beta build's quirks but I was wrong. Full release has similar issues ranging from lag spikes & desyncing to players getting disconnected while in possession teleporting the ball back to the location they were at when they disconnected & ball starting in other team's possession at kickoff at times. There are surely more abnormalities others have experienced too, it's dependent on a lot of conditions and this isn't a bug report.

Core gameplay is still fun in this rough state when everything works as normally as expected, but a lot of QoL are missing;

- Extremely limited communication options if you don't want to use your mic, I'm not sure how this was overlooked when the game draws such strong inspiration from Rocket League, a staple of which is its quick chat options, the same customizable 1-4 number menus would've worked perfectly here.

- No player reporting, if you want communication, it's via voice and there's basically no moderation. There have been times where I matched with the same few people over and over again without being in a squad with them, any past conflict you had with such players in that case can easily carry over and be a disadvantage as pre-made squads tend to only play with each other instead of passing to the poor soloq randoms who happened to match with them.

- Extremely limited control remapping - as far as I know, remapping is not even possible for controller at the moment but I am a KBM player, controls menu is confusing, for a while I didn't even know what the "Modifier" key meant as it's not even shown in the control menu until you toggle the Modifier option off & on once. You also cannot use the same keys for 2 different actions under 2 different conditions; Cannot map Defensive Stance Dash to SPACE even though no other action for Defensive Stance controls has SPACE bound. It gives you an error if SPACE is mapped to a different action (which it is by default) for another conditional control set (such as "with ball" & "without ball" controls). There is no deadzone or sensitivity setting for mouse, if you move your mouse a little too much while holding down your PASS key, it'll flick your aim and you may even end up owngoaling if you're trying to pass the ball to your teammate as GK.

- Failed actions just reset your animation, if you were about to shoot the ball & got up in the air but someone else hit it away, you just reset back to standing position and can carry on, it doesn't make sense if you already got up in the air, you should fall down & be subject to the time cost of getting back up for balance's sake. This also makes things more unpredictable for GK & Defense as multiple opponents may be together & their commitment to a failed shot basically has no penalty which lets them just dominate the position in terms of movement. Things like Jumping Block (Q) & Sliding Tackle (SHIFT + E) both have that animation penalty, your character needs to recover fully to perform another action rather than snapping back to default standing stance.

- Replay cam & game ends are all laggy, the final attack/defense may end with the ball heading towards net & even entering only for the game to say VICTORY or DEFEAT because the GK actually caught it but what you saw was different, it just feels rough man, in my eyes this is more of a nitpicking thing as I don't mind it much but it says something about the state of this game at launch, rushed.

Outside of the gameplay, my comments on UI are bound to be subjective in terms of looks, it doesn't look bad, but it looks like it belongs to a beta build. Things like item names with only the first word having a capital initial letter makes it look odd, as if it's some placeholder name. Aside from looks, certain elements outside of gameplay are also broken, the battle pass progression is a 50/50 whether it'll let you unlock the stuff or give you an error. Clicking on the cancel queue button that shows up on bottom left just makes it disappear instead of cancelling the queue, you have to hold the button for a bit and hope it'll cancel it, objectives like first win of the day are perma stuck on your screen, etc.

Character creation is nice, a lot of customizable parts, but the items themselves are limited at this time, it's fine for launch but I'm a bit surprised we're missing more casual/basic items like simple colored accessories, obviously we weren't getting a massive roster of bespoke items but nonetheless the existing selection is lackluster.

Not sure what kind of budget went into this, but I don't believe the Ronaldinho & Balenciaga collabs were both barter deals, which means some money was likely put into making the deals happen. I don't know what the plan is there but it's clear the game doesn't even have the facilities to sell such collaboration items properly in terms of marketing & eye candy, they're just kinda there, utilizing the bare minimum potential of collaborations with such high profile licenses.

The game has cheaper pricing for certain regions, this is a great move, and I would suggest exploring license deals with local teams of those regions in the future once the game gets the polish it deserved for this launch. 

Sloclap's focus should be to deliver the experience they promised for launch as soon as possible to mitigate as much player loss as possible while it's hot. Selling the game to more people should come after that, they have a good concept to build on here.

If you are currently considering buying Rematch without friends to play with you right now, don't buy it. SoloQ experience is really subpar at the moment and that is on top of all the technical problems this game has right now.

If you have friends who want to play right now, I'd say go for it, it is pretty fun when you have a squad to play with.

If you really want to give it a shot in either of the circumstances & have Xbox Gamepass, the game is a day one title there, you can take a look before committing to the price.

My overall recommendation is quite situational so I'm marking it as a NO for the time being, I'll update this when we have the build we should've gotten today on launch.

O jogo é incrível e já evoluiu bastante pode jogar sem medo, mas ainda há alguns problemas que permanecem desde o beta, como:

- Quedas de FPS durante as partidas.
- Animação de defesa do goleiro que as vezes apresenta defesa mas a bola entra no gol.
- Apos um gol quando a partida vai recomeçar as vezes a bola não fica com o time que sofreu o gol.
- As vezes ao entrar um partida um jogador fica sem conseguir dominar a bola ou roubar de um oponente, e esse problema fica ate o final daquela partida.
- Ao terminar uma partida e você tenta buscar outra sem voltar para a tela de inicio o tempo de fila fica mostrando uma informação em minutos muito grande.
- Algumas roupas e acessórios quando tem suas cores modificadas estão apresentando cores diferentes das salvas na personalização, e esse problema você só descobre  durante as partidas.

Fora esses problemas o jogo é maravilhoso e não há algum outro no mercado que entregue tudo que o esse jogo tem, e ele possui tudo para crescer cada vez mais.

Игра полнейшая дичь. Лаг на лаге, аж глаза болят, за три матча, в каждой был момент где игра просто лагает на 5 секунд. Если зайдете сюда после фифы, то просто офигеете насколько тут плохое управление, ощущения как будто играешь деревянной палкой вместо геймпада, управление просто тупее некуда (Попытался еще на клава-мыши сыграть, немного легче, но все равно посос). В той же фифе игрок хотя бы к мячу прилипает, а здесь при приближении к мячу ты в 90% случае просто пробегаешь мимо него. Обучение - дерьмо, про него больше нечего сказать. Удалил этот кал после 40 минут и вернул деньги. Не тратьте время на эту парашу. (Хотя если в вас пробудился эгоист после просмотра блю-лока, то вам наверно сойдет)

На релизе Rematch казалась глотком свежего воздуха. Я искренне верил в проект: концепция была настолько хороша, что перекрывала техническую сырость. Мы с друзьями готовы были терпеть многое: и баги, и пинг, который занимался газлайтингом, убеждая, что пойманный мяч на самом деле уже в воротах. Это было весело, свежо и дарило эмоции.

Но с приходом осени и введением кроссплатформенности что-то в механизме игры сломалось окончательно.
Система подбора игроков (matchmaking) превратилась в злую шутку. Ощущение, что балансировщик просто кидает имена в барабан и крутит его наугад. Никакой логики, никакого равенства сил — чистый рандом.
С багами ситуация классическая для инди-прома: разработчики героически победили старые ошибки, но на их место пришли новые, еще более изощренные. Из плюсов могу отметить разве что новые анимации и улучшенный сетевой код — соединение действительно стало стабильнее, но на общем фоне это выглядит как полировка перил на тонущем корабле.

Вместе с патчами в игру завезли вагон донатного контента. Мне безразличны скины, но вектор развития студии считывается моментально: монетизация явно преобладает над починкой геймплея.
Добили ситуацию ноябрьские проблемы с серверами Amazon. Разумеется, разработчики не виноваты в падении AWS или Cloudflare, но конечному пользователю от этого не легче. Осадок от невозможности нормально поиграть остался, и он не выветривается.

Если у вас нет пару друзей — даже не думайте запускать игру. Местные «профи» — это люди с патологическим эгоизмом. Складывается впечатление, что большинство из них готовы продать родную мать за лишний забитый гол. Никакой командной работы, пасов или тактики — только слепое желание набить личную статистику любой ценой. Без негатива, просто констатация факта.

В текущем состоянии Rematch не стоит своих денег.
Покупать ее сейчас — ошибка. Единственный вариант, при котором стоит тратить время на установку — если игра досталась вам бесплатно и у вас есть компания друзей, готовая оценить саму задумку. В одиночку здесь делать нечего, если только вы не мазохист.

"Jogo promissor, mas lançamento decepcionante"

O Rematch tem um potencial enorme e é divertido quando você consegue jogar. No entanto, infelizmente, o lançamento tem sido bastante frustrante.

Tenho cerca de 8 horas registradas na Steam, mas provavelmente passei menos da metade disso realmente dentro de partidas. O resto foi esperando em filas, travado no lobby ou lidando com problemas de conexão. Jogar sozinho é quase impossível — o matchmaking demora demais. Em grupo, parece um pouco mais rápido, mas ainda longe do ideal.

Além disso, vários bugs começaram a aparecer no lançamento que não estavam no beta, o que é estranho. Esperava mais estabilidade e polimento, principalmente depois da boa impressão que o beta deixou.

Acredito que o jogo pode se tornar algo muito bom no futuro, mas no estado atual, é difícil recomendar. Espero que os desenvolvedores corrijam os problemas logo — o público está aqui, só falta o jogo funcionar direito.


EDIT***

Jogue com time fechado, o jogo se torna melhor pela interação e você consegue encontrar partidas mais rapidas. 

Depois do dia 19 aparentemente tem menos bugs (mas ainda persiste), mas ainda está ocorrendo quedas no servidores.

Концепция игры понятна, приятна, кайфова. Однако все портит комьюнити, которое думает (в большинстве своем, хоть есть и много адекватных), что они киберспортсмены с огромным стажем. Ни пасов, ни тимплея. Только соло. Ладно если бы мог что-то из себя представлять. Так это повторяется с каждым 1м-2м. Невозможно нормально контактировать. Только понты и никаких пасов. Играется много, играется интересно, но этот аспект большое "НО"!. Еще непонятна оптимизация. Шанс, что мяч зарегает именно на тебе 50на50. Даже можно сказать 70на30 не в твою пользу. В общем и целом, поиграв столько времени можно сказать, что добавляются только косметические эффекты. Игровой процесс все такой же по ощущениям, что и на первых этапах - сырая штука
Далее: Игроки не понимают, что такое командная игра. Если нет сквада по связи - скорее всего ты проиграешь. Механики ужасны: Лаги в фиксации, чаще всего против тебя. а если соперник не ловит мяч, через пару минут не будешь и ты! Разрабы, просьба - хватит добавлять паки за золото и сконцентрируйтесь на балансах, механиках и игровом процессе. Они ужасны, как и ВЫ!!!!!!!! Призываю вас исправить прием мяча, более чутко проработать весь игровой процесс. Хоть вы и хрен услышите. Хочется клясть вас вскми матами, но вы вряд ли услышите. Ненавижу вас и тот день, когда купил ваш мусор. Но альтернативы нет, поэтому кушаю это дерьмо. Народ, точно НЕ СОВЕТУЮ

Fan de Rocket League (1500h) et de foot arcade en général, j'attendais ce jeu avec impatiente. 

Voici mon ressenti :

Alors que tout s'est bien passé dans le tuto, j'ai presque l'impression que le jeu est différent une fois en match.
Déjà, c'est un peu l'ambiance cour de récré : des pseudo stars qui jouent perso et abusent des grigris, tout le monde qui court dans tous les sens sans poste attribué. On a parfois les même comportements dans RL, sauf que l'anarchie se ressent encore plus en 5v5.
Mais c'est vraiment au niveau du gameplay que j'ai du mal à accrocher : pas de sensations, mauvaise maîtrise du ballon. Les contrôles sont vraiment pas ouf. Parfois on passe sur le ballon sans même l'amener avec soi (lags ?).

N'arrivant pas à trouver mes marques, j'ai essayé les 2 gameplays :

- A la manette :
Les commandes sont instinctives mais c'est trop imprécis et la caméra est capricieuse et lente.

- Au clavier/souris :
La visée est beaucoup plus rapide et précise mais les commandes deviennent trop complexes pour être fun. On s'y perd tellement que même faire une simple passe est parfois compliqué.

Bref, dans un gameplay comme dans l'autre, je n'ai pas vraiment pris de plaisir à y jouer.
Des fois on sent qu'un jeu est difficile ou complexe mais qu'il vaut le coup de persévérer. Dans le cas de Rematch, j'ai du mal à percevoir ce potentiel.
J'ai demandé son remboursement.

Update:
After sinking some hours in freeplay and playing in matches to familiarize with the controls, I still have some gripes. A controller feels more natural until you try to aim at a specific point to shoot. KB+M is more comfortable for me but struggling with passes as the slightest movement of the mouse right after pressing pass would derail the pass following the mouse movement. There has to be an implementation where the game should read the mouse direction for passing only if the mouse travels a certain length, or an option to turn it off entirely. I can aim with my mouse and that should be enough thank you very much.

The game surely is fun but the threat of derailing your pass because you were not always ultra-conscious of every micrometer of your mouse movement 100% of the time takes away from the experience.

=====================================================

Controls are a bit awkward, but that's probably because this game is literally the first of its kind, and that means it takes some getting used to. Art is great, sound and VFX really adds to tactility and responsiveness and immersion in the action. Most of all, even if you enjoy but suck at this game, it makes for a very entertaining watch!

Après 20 heures de jeu, je pense pouvoir donner mon avis sur ce jeu.
Premièrement, l'éventail d'animations rendent les actions vraiment toujours stylées et naturelles.
Le jeu encourage vraiment beaucoup le team play par des *points* qui augmentent vraiment vite si un coequipier reçoit la passe.Malheureusement, c'est théorique... La plupart des games ou je joue il y a d'office UNE PERSONNE QUI VA FAIRE PERDRE LE MATCH A LUI TOUT SEUL CAR IL NE FAIT JAMAIS LA PASSE, NE SAIT NI DRIBBLED NI FAIRE DE FINISSIONS ET QUI SPAMME LES : bien joué bien joué bien joué... j'espère que vous n'avez pas trop senti le sel accumulé...
sinon oui les passes sont fluides graces au : taps ( que j'utilise personelemment pour faire des buts ce qui est particulièrement satisfaisant.
pour l'instant au niveau des bugs je n'en ai vu aucun alors que j'ai commencé day one donc la je ne pourrai pas trop donner mon opinion..
Par contre des crashs ça j'en ai eu... alors que ma connection est toujours parfaite sur tout les jeux en ligne auquels j'ai joué mais je garde quand même le bon soupçon.
mais quand il y avait pas les gens qui ne font jamais la passe je passais un bon moment (LOL).

Au final pour moi c'est un bon jeu mais encore gangréné par des joueurs a la philosophie digne d'un jimpachi ego ce qui rend beaucoup de parties insoutenable par le manque de team play ce qui est paradoxal quand on y pense.
Voilà c'est la première fois que je fais un commentaire aussi long sur un jeu j'espère que ça vous aura aidés et que ça n'aura pas été trop long,

サッカーゲームというジャンルにおいて、新風を吹き込もうとしているのが『REMATCH』だ。本作は直感的な操作性と偶発的なスーパープレイを魅力に掲げ、プレイヤーに一瞬の輝きをもたらす。しかし、光がある一方で、影も少なくないのが現状だ。

良かった点：操作性と演出の瞬発力
まず特筆すべきは、その操作感だ。複雑なチュートリアルを必要とせず、初見でもある程度動かせるようになる「触ってすぐ楽しい」設計は、初心者にも優しい。操作キャラクターの反応も軽快で、パスやシュートに対するレスポンスは悪くない。
特に、時折発生する「まぐれ」と言いたくなるほどのカッコいいシュート演出は、プレイ中のテンションを一気に跳ね上げる。たとえ負け試合でも、それ一発で「今日は良かった」と思える瞬発力がある。

悪かった点：価格と完成度のギャップ
しかし、冷静に見れば気になる点も多い。まず価格設定。新作タイトルとはいえ、3700円という価格は、同ジャンルの金字塔『ロケットリーグ』と比較した際にやや強気すぎる印象が否めない。プレイ体験の密度やリプレイ性において、まだ肩を並べるには早計だと感じる。

また、クラッシュ（強制終了）が頻発する点は致命的だ。特にオンラインマッチ中に突然落ちることがあるため、勝負所での没入感が一気に冷めてしまう。技術的な完成度には、まだまだ磨きが必要だろう。

さらに、課金要素についても触れておきたい。現時点では「課金することで劇的に楽しくなる」という明確なリターンが乏しく、ゲーム内経済の設計に関しても再考の余地がある。

総評：素材は良質、磨き次第で化ける可能性あり
『REMATCH』は決して悪いゲームではない。直感的な楽しさと時折のスーパープレイ、そして何より新しいことに挑戦しようとする姿勢には、一定の評価を与えたい。ただし、価格・安定性・課金要素といった根幹の部分において、ユーザーの期待値を上回るにはまだ至っていない。

素材としてのポテンシャルは十分に感じられる。今後のアップデート次第で、化ける可能性を秘めたタイトルであることは間違いない。

評価：★★★☆☆（3/5）
おすすめ対象：軽く遊びたい人、一発のカッコよさを求める人。ただし、価格と安定性には注意

Hemen anladım! Linki kontrol ettim ve REMATCH'in gerçekten de 5v5, üçüncü şahıs bakış açısına sahip, aksiyon dolu bir futbol (soccer) oyunu olduğunu gördüm. Daha önceki yorumlarımda bahsettiğim genel oyun özelliklerinin bazıları bu oyuna uyarken, bazılarını futbol özelinde güncelleyebiliriz.

Özellikle "Control one player" (tek bir oyuncuyu kontrol etme) ve "No fouls, no downtime, just pure football action" (faul yok, bekleme yok, sadece saf futbol aksiyonu) gibi vurgular, oyunun daha çok arcade tarzı, hızlı ve akıcı bir oynanışa sahip olduğunu gösteriyor. Stratejik derinlikten ziyade, anlık reaksiyonlar ve bireysel beceri ön planda gibi görünüyor.

O zaman, REMATCH'in bir futbol oyunu olduğunu göz önünde bulundurarak, sana özel, daha isabetli ve Steam'de paylaşmaya uygun, puanlamalı bir yorum hazırladım:

REMATCH: Futbola Yeni Bir Bakış (Hem Aşık Oldum Hem Deliye Döndüm!)
Uzun zamandır takip ettiğim, hatta çıktığı ilk günden beri beklediğim REMATCH'i sonunda deneyimleme fırsatım oldu. Açıkçası beklentilerim yüksekti ama oyun, hem olumlu hem de olumsuz yönleriyle beni şaşırtmayı başardı. Bir insan yazmış gibi samimi bir şekilde aktarayım istedim:

Olumlu Yönleri:

Hızlı ve Kesintisiz Aksiyon: REMATCH, futbol oyunlarına yeni ve dinamik bir soluk getiriyor. "Faul yok, ofsayt yok, bekleme yok" mottosu tam da anlatıldığı gibi. Maçlar inanılmaz tempolu ve sürekli aksiyon halindesiniz. Bir oyuncuyu kontrol etme mekaniği, sizi olayın tam kalbine sokuyor ve her pasın, her şutun önemini hissettiriyor. Futbolu daha çok arcade tarzında, bol gollü ve dinamik sevenler için birebir.
Görsel Şölen ve Atmosfer: Oyunun grafikleri gerçekten etkileyici. Sahalar, oyuncu modelleri ve genel atmosfer çok canlı. Kendinizi gerçekten o stadyumda, o maçın içindeymiş gibi hissediyorsunuz. Görsel detaylar ve akıcı animasyonlar, oyun keyfini katlıyor.
Beceri Odaklı Oynanış: "Oyuncu istatistiği yok, her şey yeteneğine bağlı" vaadi de gerçekleşmiş. Kazanmak tamamen sizin bireysel becerinize, paslarınızı ne kadar iyi ayarladığınıza ve takım arkadaşlarınızla ne kadar iyi uyum sağladığınıza bağlı. Bu durum, her maçta kendinizi geliştirme motivasyonu veriyor ve kazanmanın verdiği hazzı artırıyor.
Eğlenceli ve Bağımlılık Yapıcı: Arkadaşlarınızla veya rastgele oyuncularla bir araya gelip bu hızlı tempolu maçlara katılmak çok eğlenceli. Özellikle gol atma mekaniği ve topa hakim olma hissiyatı gayet tatmin edici. Kısa sürede bir maç atıp çıkabiliyor olmak, oyunu bağımlılık yapıcı hale getiriyor.

Olumsuz Yönleri:

Öğrenme Eğrisi ve İletişim: Bir oyuncuyu kontrol etme fikri harika ama özellikle takım oyununda koordinasyon ilk başlarda zorlayıcı olabilir. Takım arkadaşlarınızla sesli iletişim kurmuyorsanız, paslaşma ve pozisyon alma konusunda sıkıntılar yaşayabilirsiniz. Bu durum, daha organize takımlara karşı dezavantaj yaratabiliyor. Keşke oyunda daha etkili bir ping sistemi veya hızlı iletişim seçenekleri olsaydı.
Tekrarlayabilen Mekanikler: Maçlar hızlı ve eğlenceli olsa da, bir yerden sonra oynayış döngüsü biraz kendini tekrar ediyormuş gibi hissettirebilir. Daha fazla oyun modu veya maç içi dinamik olaylar, uzun süreli oynanışta monotonluğu kırabilirdi.
Optimizasyon Sorunları (Yer Yer): Oyunun grafikleri iyi olmasına rağmen, bazı anlarda veya yoğun sahnelerde FPS düşüşleri yaşadım. Bu da akıcı oynanışı biraz baltaladı. Umarım bu sorunlar gelecek güncellemelerle giderilir. Yüksek sistem gereksinimleri olan bir oyun olduğunu unutmayın.
Top Fizikleri ve Vuruşlar: Genel olarak top fizikleri iyi olsa da, bazı anlarda topun beklenmedik şekilde sekmesi veya vuruşların istediğiniz gibi gitmemesi gibi durumlarla karşılaşabiliyorsunuz. Bu da özellikle kritik anlarda sinir bozucu olabiliyor. Biraz daha cilalanması gerektiğini düşünüyorum.

Benim Puanım: 7.5/10
REMATCH, geleneksel futbol oyunlarına eğlenceli ve aksiyon dolu bir alternatif sunuyor. Özellikle hızlı tempolu, beceri odaklı ve takım oyununa dayalı bir deneyim arıyorsanız, bu oyun tam size göre. Ufak tefek pürüzlerine rağmen beni saatlerce ekran başına kilitlemeyi başardı.

Eğer yeni ve dinamik bir futbol deneyimi arıyorsanız, kesinlikle bir şans verin!

Premesso che ho giocato la beta per più di 30 ore, il gioco è fantastico e divertentissimo, è un mix tra rocket league e fifa street.

Praticamente è il calcetto senza regole in cui i giocatori in campo si scambiano i ruoli tra loro e c'è anche la regola del portiere "volante", niente punizioni, rigori, calci d'angolo, ammonizioni, espulsioni, scordatevi tutte ste cose, perchè è calcetto allo stato puro.

Il gioco è uscito da poco, ovviamente riceverà tanti aggiornamenti per fixare alcune cose, ma il gioco allo stato attuale è godibile e spassoso.

Il gioco è basato esclusivamente sulle skill del giocatore, le uniche cose acquistabili sono skin e personalizzazioni varie.

Chi vuole iniziare a giocarci, il mio consiglio è quello di prendere la versione base a 24,99 euro, se poi vi coinvolge, allora fate l'upgrade alla pro (34,99 euro) o alla elite edition (44,99 euro) in base a quello che preferite voi, personalmente ho preso l'elite edition, perchè il gioco mi piace un sacco.

Il consiglio che vi do è di comprarlo, non ve ne pentirete!

The game is good fun and easy to play. For the cost, it's a solid option.

That being said, unless you're playing with a coordinated group, Ranked mode can quickly become frustrating. It's already being ruined by players scoring own goals, not playing as a team, and generally griefing others.

I highly recommend playing Ranked with at least three friends to stand a chance against the griefers out there. Personally, I went from Silver to Bronze in just five games simply because I wasn’t playing with my regular team. Ranked has now been ruined for me—I was hooked on competitive play, but I kept getting matched with players only interested in flashy skill moves or deliberately sabotaging the match.

I still recommend you do get a chance to play with some good people out there who are enjoying the game for what it is.

Lan oyun başta manyak sarıyo. Top fiziği, goller, şutlar falan on numara, ellerinize sağlık diyosun ama sonra… tek girdin mi var ya, geçmiş olsun.
Takım arkadaşları değil sanki mahalleden zorla toplanmış dangalaklar.

Ulan adam kaleci, kaleyi bırakmış orta sahaya gelmiş ‘ben de oynicam’ triplerinde.
Defans desen tribünden izliyo maçı, biri koşuyo, bizimki karakter animasyonuna hayran kalmış gibi bakıyo.
Forvet topu alınca anasını satim Messi moduna giriyo, pas mas yok, ego tavan.
Sonra topu kaptırıyor, bi de üstüne suçu sana atıyo.

Lan yeter ya, ben oyuna eğlenmeye mi giriyorum, yoksa sabır taşı olup çatlamaya mı?
Her maç IQ seviyesiyle yerçekimine meydan okuyan 3 tane salak düşüyo takıma.
Yeminle maç sonu gol sevincinden çok, oyunu silmemeye karar verdiğime seviniyorum.

Arkadaşla girince mis, çayını al, küfürünü et, topunu çevir. Ama tek girersen...
Ya monitöre yumruk atarsın ya da Steam hesabını gömersin.

Allah’ını seven bu oyuna arkadaşsız girmesin.
Yemin ediyorum kanser ediyo insanı, sinirden koltuk ısırttı bana.

Think of a game where you NEED to work together as flawlessly as possible to get the win. A game without any power-ups, classes, or advantages everyone is on the same playing field, and it truly comes down to skill.
Now add soccer to that bad boy, and that’s rematch in a nut shell.

But it's not without its cons:

The game can bug out (like the cement soccer ball y’all know exactly what bug I’m talking about)

I’ve lagged out and crashed once

Egoists are rare, but they do ruin the game. Honestly, they feel like clip farmers sometimes.

Long que times for quick match 5v5 for me (4v4, 3v3 I get a math within 3 mins)

So me and the boys were in that eternal cycle,
"What are we playing tonight?"
Tired of the same games, same maps, same salty arguments over who's carrying who.
Then we found REMATCH... and man, it was like discovering fire all over again.

In short my answer is: I don’t recommend it yet.

This game is going to be great eventually but it’s missing some important stuff. Some of this could be dismissed as “get good” but it’s stuff rocket league has. 

1. Ball tracking is baaad on MK and controller. Needs a lock on ability or something. Something Rocket League has.
2. Control remapping is way too limited. I should be able to map my mouse thumb buttons to something in the With Ball state and Without Ball states and cant.
3. How is a game called "REMATCH" launching without a feature to request a rematch? Seems pretty obvious.
4. Needs an offline/against bots mode. 

On the last point, I do not want to have to practice in a public match. That isnt fair to people in my opinion on either side. People who've been playing since the beta getting matched with people like me still trying to learn controls is not cool. I want to play offline for a bit before I play online.

Another review summed up the rest of the game very well in saying it looks like an early launched Free to play game with the amount of content in it. It’s so barebones on customization it’s laughable. 

As I said, this will be good eventually. But it’s not worth the price tag as of launch day.

EDIT::
I am actually refunding this for now. The more I've thought about it, the more angry I am at the blatant lack of customization options available in the base game without having to pay more money. This is not a $30 game and the monetization shop at launch has more things to buy than the base game offers you out the gate. I'll buy when it eventually gets discount $10-15 off but this is not a $30 game at the moment.

说实话不推荐原因如下
1.内测的时候在小黑盒里个人表达了对于这类型的游戏能够自定义按键是非常重要的，
足球游戏无非是FIFA和实况遗老，诚然这个游戏是不可能完全在操作上对应的。
但是每个玩家习惯不同让玩家去在这两者的基础上去自定义自己的操作方式是第一优先级的，
因为你不做这个，你就先逼着玩家适应你的方式。等你上线了自定义我是在以前的操作方式上改新的操作方式？那我可就前前后后为了玩你的游戏去掌握三套操作方式，不适应的话我就得继续学习你安排的方式。你这不是纯纯找骂？
而官方回复的就是要做其他内容和平衡
2顺着上一点你的新内容就是序章是吧？你的传球射门调整的平衡被人喷出屎也不说了
3竞技游戏我个人的观点应该必须要有好的ai对战模式作为基础，这个也没做
新人只能直面老玩家的口水
综上所述不推荐

Yes! Finally a game that lets me relive my old football days!
I can recommend this game right now, but with the following caveats:

1) Stability issues do exist and will hopefully be patched. I have experienced 3 crashes, intermittent rubber-banding, and some other bugs across 12ish hours of gameplay (on a GTX 1070 mind you).
2) Teammates in solo queue often try to play 1v5 despite several pass options being available before getting stripped immediately. Kind of frustrating, but that’s solo queue for you. 

Despite that, it’s a blast to play. With a little effort you can absolutely find a group of players to run it back with. Hopefully Sloclap is able to roll out some patches to smooth over networking and technical issues as well. Otherwise, really enjoying this game!

Enfin un jeu de football pour ceux qui aiment le football ! Fun, rapide mais avec beaucoup de maîtrise, Rematch s'impose comme le jeu de l'été. 
Depuis les premières Beta le jeu à évolué dans le bon sens, écoutant le retour des joueurs. 

Bien loin des jeux traditionnels remplis d'aléatoires et de "scripts", Rematch fait la part belle à la coopération et à la précision. 
Tirs, courses, passes tout est millimétré : gestion des effets, longueur des passes, durée du boost ... 
Comme tout jeu de foot, l'important est de marquer et Rematch fait ça parfaitement, les tirs sont spectaculaires, les combinaisons très jouissives et les gestes techniques toujours dévastateurs. 

Rematch est une vraie réussite ! Bravo à l'équipe !m 

J'ai hâte de voir le développement du mode compétitif et l'évolution des stratégies dans le jeu. 

Petite idée d'amélioration : Lors des célébrations de buts, ouvrir le chat vocal entre les équipes pour imiter la réalité d'un terrain de foot.

reviews.review: Controls are clunky and unintuitive with shots randomly veering 90° off-target. Rocket League, a car game with double jumps and aerial shots has 10x better controls. That’s saying something.

TLDR: No one plays due to the paywall. Not to mention it also has paid battlepass. A lot of bugs from first closed beta are still present. Their priority is making skins than fixing stuff.

Positive side: there's cross-play now. Negative: Full of memory leaks and performance degradation after a few minutes inside the game. I start it with 70 FPS and few mins later without touching my computer i get 40 FPS in the same menu. 

I do not recommend it. It is not early access. The game was released with several details left out.

A bunch of cosmetics are behind a paywall ("battle pass").

Points to improve:
- Freedom to choose who will touch the ball in the first few seconds. Instead, you are forced to pass backwards (locked) and then start playing from that point. It is worth remembering that this is an arcade game and this would improve the quality of life in the game.
- Possibility to choose your preferred position before the match: Goalkeeper, Defender, Wingers (left and right). This would allow the player to always spawn in a certain position during the match.

Great game very good fun

LO BUENO: 
Jugablemente es muy divertido, los movimientos se sienten bien, tanto en defensa como en ataque es muy gratificante hacer las cosas bien, las mecánicas son simples pero la dificultad está en tomar las decisiones correctas lo más rápido posible.

LO MALO:
Lo primero es que cuesta 25€, no es caro, pero se siente como un free to play, hay micropagos, pases de batalla, skins... parece que se habían preparado para ponerlo gratis si el juego no funcionaba.

La conexión es lamentable, no se puede explicar como un juego que cuesta dinero juegues una partida a 40 de ping en el mejor de los casos y en la siguiente a 80 estando en el mismo servidor.

Hay bastantes mecánicas de las que la gente abusa y son indefendibles, no está mal que la gente haga combos y demás para poder regatear o marcar goles, pero hay veces que se sienten injustas porque algunas dan frames de invulnerabilidad en los cuales no puedes hacer nada.

La comunidad a veces es desesperante, antes de dar un pase fácil hacen un rainbow flick para regalar el balón al rival, si te toca alguien que no respeta los turnos de portero prácticamente es una derrota automática (señores, esto no es Blue Lock, pasadla de vez en cuando) por ahora no hay ningún sistema de ban de jugadores ni de hacer clubs ni parece que haya ningún matchmaking Jugar solo en rankeds es un suplicio, si quieres subir de rango sin amigos que jueguen te va a tocar quedarte de la mitad del campo para abajo intentando recuperar algún balón (también hay que decir que hay gente estupenda que quiere jugar bien, por desgracia es menos de la que a todos nos gustaría, pero la hay)

Ya hay gente usando trucos, no tengo mucho que decir sobre esto, solo espero que metan algún sistema para solventarlo antes de que sea injugable y el juego muera.

Hay bastantes bugs, algunos son menores como los de traducción y algún crasheo pero también los hay que literalmente no puedes tocar el balón o te quedas flotando en el aire, por desgracia la beta que jugamos hace 2 meses era mas una demo que una beta.

CONCLUSIONES: 
Si arreglan los bugs y los exploits va a ser un juego muy querido y va a perdurar en el tiempo aunque es probable que en 1/2 años sea F2P para que entre mas gente al juego cuando se pase el hype inicial. Mis amigos y yo estamos enganchados aun con todo lo malo que tiene el juego, supongo que es buena señal.

Good
Great Game

First off, this game is fantastic. I’ve always appreciated Sloclap’s unique style, especially with titles like Sifu and Absolver, and Rematch continues that legacy in a fresh and exciting way. It plays like Rocket League without the driving, but without the penalty cards of traditional soccer—and that’s part of the fun.

That said, like many games at launch, it isn’t without its issues. There are some bugs, ranging from minor visual glitches to more disruptive netcode desyncs. But the most significant flaw right now is the lack of crossplay, which isn’t available at launch.

I understand that Sloclap is a relatively small team, and crossplay—especially between consoles—can be difficult to implement due to the various platform requirements and approvals. Thankfully, the developers have acknowledged this and stated that enabling crossplay is their top priority, even if it may take some time.

Despite these early hiccups, the game looks stunning and controls exceptionally well (when desync isn’t an issue). I truly believe that once these problems are ironed out, Rematch has the potential to stand alongside Rocket League—if not surpass it. As always, keep up the hard work Sloclap, the fans of your games will always appreciate the efforts while you fix and build this game!

如果单单只说游戏的质量，那么本作整体的玩法在成熟度和玩法的多样性上远比大部分内容都自动操作的《FIFA》要强，并且本作中融入了一些动作游戏的元素，完美的将足球和动作游戏结合，玩家们想要流畅的操控出简单的射门、传球可能需要学习和练习，但是理解游戏简化了大部分足球规则之后的玩法显然要比传统足球游戏简单的多。稍显遗憾的是游戏目前服务器有延迟，同时游戏的游玩人数并不算多，匹配需要等待一段时间。


太长不看版购买指南
动作游戏的快速反应遇上了足球
基本上删除了各种规则的独特足球游戏
易上手难精通的多人游戏

[h1]真少林功夫足球？！[/h1]
本作截至目前总共评价4000+条，只有100条左右是来自国内玩家的评价，从这个数据你就不难看出本作在国内并不能算是一款受众非常大的游戏，哪怕是笔者身边十个男生里面起码会有两三个人游玩NBA2K，但是游玩FIFA的人确实相较于前者少了非常多。而这种大环境之下本作作为多人游戏最大的问题，在线匹配不到人的问题就会出现。

当然你也可以去外服匹配，只不过游戏原本的服务器延迟就比较高，同时如果没有开启加速器，还偶尔会出现掉出的情况，去欧美服游玩更是在高延迟之外增加了额外的debuff。

但是抛开上面的这两个问题之外，本作确实在足球游戏这条道路上走出了非常独特的一条道路，在很早之前笔者就在某个小游戏平台游玩过横板2.5D视角下的功夫足球，各种炫酷的射门技能搭配上帅气的盘带，可以是完美的还原了笔者年少胖胖身躯之下的梦。

而本作虽然并没有加入上面所说的炫酷的技能，但是却将足球游戏和动作游戏结合起来，盘带和射门不再是按下按键，在恰当的地方松手的蓄力内容，而是需要多个键组合同时需要玩家快速反应的“动作”游戏。

同时本作为了简化玩家玩家的上手难度，基本上删减了大部分足球运动中的规则，游戏中不会出现越位，同时也不会因为铲人让对手受伤，哪怕是不懂足球的玩家在经历了新手介绍的序章和游戏设计的教程之后也能快速上手本作。

但是想要精通本作显然是需要下一番功夫，射门时鼠标移动的方向和fps的快速定点有一拼，同时防守，不同类型的接球，不同类型的传球等等都需要玩家多个键组合，而想要完成一套爽气的过人更是需要对于游戏操作的精确理解和练习。


[h1]结语[/h1]
如果你喜欢足球游戏和动作游戏，那么融合了这两者的本作显然能让你满意，但是如果你只是喜欢足球游戏，对于动作游戏不怎么感兴趣，那么显然还是传统的《FIFA》或是《足球经理》更加适合你。
评分8.5/10

Droga pura. 

Todavía tiene cosas que mejorar, pero es mejor de lo que parece a primera vista. Mucho mejor opción que echarse un FIFA o un PES.

Le falta mejorar temas de estabilidad y añadir el crossplay (ya están en ello), aunque están sacando actualizaciones continuas para mejorarlo.

También han avisado de muchas mejoras por venir, modos de juego, mecánicas, etc. 
Este juego tiene un gran futuro.

En cuanto a las microtransacciones, sólo son para cosméticos, además de que el 99% se puede conseguir con la moneda que te dan jugando (de hecho a mi me sobra). Las alternativas que hay ahora mismo (fifa, PES, 2k...) en cambio todas tienen opciones P2W, pagas 80 pavos por el juego y encima tienes que pagar para tener una experiencia total.
La cuestión es que si quieres un juego competitivo online que no dure una sola temporada, algo así tiene que tener para monetizarlo y seguir mejorando.

Por menos de 30 pavos, creo que es la mejor inversión que se puede hacer si quieres jugar con colegas, competitivo, o sólo echarte unas partidas rápidas en los ratos muertos.

[h3]Positive Summary[/h3]
[b]tldr; potential rating is 10/10, current rating is 6.5/10 due to issues.[/b]
on a foundational level, this is a fantastic game that i would recommend anyone picks up and tries. it's both extremely fun for casual players and has massive competitive potential. however, as of release day, there are still a lot of critical problems that severely impact gameplay.
[hr][/hr]
[h3]Critical Issues[/h3]
1 - [b]dubious netcode, to put it lightly[/b] : weird rollbacks and server-side resolutions resulting in broken animations, desyncs, balls going through your legs in defensive stance, ball going through the keeper's hands, certain inputs getting straight eaten by the server (ex: defensive dash into goalie dive if performed too quickly in succession), etc. i have personally also experienced several DCs mid-match where every player would keep moving in the direction they had been until i reconnect, the problem was not on my end since discord was working completely fine while it was happening. 
2 - [b]a few unbalanced and unpolished mechanics[/b] : some mechanics need work, with the most obvious one being the passing system on mouse and keyboard. even while practicing it in a vacuum it never quite feels like the ball goes where you input it to go, and it also seems to instantly snap to a completely different direction if you input even a nanometer away from where you were previously aiming near the end of your pass motion, which will inevitably sometimes happen due to human inaccuracy. a few goalkeeper options are also actually terrible, with forward dive (in a few key scenarios), neutral dive and tackles in particular being very unreliable at higher levels of play, each for different reasons. this is especially felt when paired with the netcode issues. dives also uncommonly make you punch the ball away rather than catch it, and while im sure there is a concrete reason for this, it just adds more inconsistency to the game and feels bad. the aiming system when shooting the ball is a little strange as well since the ball never quite goes exactly where you're aiming, it always goes a little higher or lower. the off-center crosshair also contributes to making it less than ideal.
3 - [b]common crashes and visual bugs[/b] : self-explanatory, it feels like every other match someone crashes or bugs out with their inputs not registering. the UI also commonly fails to display properly, for example sometimes some players in a group won't see the ongoing queue, while others will.
[hr][/hr]
[h3]Bottom Line[/h3]
there are a few other issues, but to me those are the main ones; if just those were all fixed, the game would be in a state where i'd personally be very happy with it.

As an Indonesian gamer with less-than-great internet, I can’t really recommend this game right now.

I usually have no issues playing online titles like Marvel Rivals, COD:Black Ops 6, or EAFC 25, even the both of Rematch betas ran fine with < 60ms ping and zero packet loss.

But this game? The launch experience was a mess for me. My expectations were already cautious, but the reality was worse, constant desync, players blinking around the map, and an overall unplayable mess.

If you're in a similar situation I’d suggest holding off for now. It's a promising game, and I hope the devs can iron out the network issues soon. It could be a great experience… if it ever runs properly.

I love this game, but for the sake of being honest, i cannot suggest it right now.

It has a lot of very good stuff going for it, but there are FAR more issues that I hope they will fix ASAP, before the game dies, and it is dying already.

- Desync destroy games and sometimes decides who wins and who loses.
- Servers are VERY bad.
- Teamplay is discouraged by individual skills such as blade shot (it is better to just do it instead of passing the ball).
- Dribbling is extremely inconsistent, to the point where sometimes you keep the ball in such and awkward way that you did not expect it.
- Disconnections are very frequent, even after all the "fixes".
- Meta is Volleyball and not Soccer. Which, i mean... do I even have to add more? Top teams (even against whom we have played) have already provided feedback many times in order to nerf volleyball.
- Matchmaking does not exist. You can be silver and play with complete random ranks, maybe even master and such.
- Solo queue CAN and WILL be facing 5 stacks and teams, with no reason. This is the only "competitive" game that make this a thing, and it should NEVER exist. You will lose matches because the opponents are all a premade on discord or a team that trains everyday, and you have random dudes on your team facing the same issue. This is valid for duos and trios as well, you will face entire teams. Have fun I guess...

These are the main issues that will make this game die if they don't fix them ASAP (less than a month, I would say.)

There are other issues, such as no replay feature in a competitive team match. So no possibility for teams to rewatch and analyze matches, it's kinda crazy. No tournaments in game like in Rocket League, where every bunch of hours there is something to compete in, even just for training... speaking of training, they could have added training grounds that are NOT tutorials, where you can practice in game scenarios, shots etc... well, they didn't.

Overall, the game is extremely flawed, but also very good when it works and nobody abuses the issues, and with a few good patches, this could become and excellent game, and I hope it will.

Needs some work on netcode. Players ghosting straight through you, ball visually bouncing off you during interceptions but then ghosting through a second later, and in general everything seems to be off.

[b]Rematch[/b] - это динамичная, спортивная, аркадная игра.
Сравнивать с сериями игр, такими как: FIFA, eFootball PES, я бы не стал, игра больше похожа на Rocket League, фанатам RL должно понравиться.

[u]Порог входа[/u] - низкий.
Игра не перегружена сложными механиками, что делает её доступной даже для новичков. 
Механики хоть и просты, но управление не всегда отзывчивое, к сожалению. Иногда хватаешься за голову, мол как так вышло, пытался дать пас в одну сторону, мяч улетел в противоположную. [spoiler]Возможно это я такой криворукий[/spoiler]

[u]Графика[/u] - яркая, мультяшная, стильная и минималистичная. Как по мне, верное решение, реализм тут и не нужен. 
Присутствует кастомизация вашего героя. Чувствую скинов навалят в будущем мама не горюй, как я понял, на полях тоже есть разные эффекты, так что готовимся, в дальнейшем все будет сверкать, взрываться и тд. Будет футбольное шоу! 

Как и многие новые проекты, на старте Rematch не лишена багов, местами текст не помещается в рамки, присутствуют краши и вылеты. Надеюсь, в скором времени доведут все до ума.

[h1]Insano e extremamente divertido, quando funciona. [/h1]

A ideia de [b]REMATCH[/b] é o foco no jogador sem deixar de ser um jogo arcade, ignorando qualquer tipo de regras e dando autonomia para usar suas habilidades e comandos para realizar jogadas para alcançar o gol. A rápida duração das partidas, o foco maior nas skills e a resenha em equipe é o diferencial que chama atenção aqui. Porém é preciso ressaltar alguns pontos:

- Definitivamente não vale o preço pelo que é proposto no momento, a barreira financeira pode levar o jogo ao limbo como vem fazendo com os últimos multijogadores pagos do mercado.
- Interface de usuário pouco confortável e confusa.
- Poucas opções de mapeamento de comandos e funções.
- Customização simplista demais.
- Bugs, crash e desyncs constantes.
- Matchmaking falho no pareamento por habilidade.
- Diferença entre jogar no controle e no teclado muito evidente.
- Pouco conteúdo para o lançamento.

Eles tiveram uma excelente ideia mas aparentemente rusharam o lançamento para atender alguma janela financeira interna. Apesar de tudo isso, o potencial aqui ainda é absurdo. Vai depender agora da Sloclap ouvir a comunidade e entregar conteúdo/atualizações pós lançamento.

这是一个很好玩的游戏，但不得不说，网络问题非常大。先不提频繁的游戏中掉线，更严重的是我已经不止一次在开始匹配后，过一会儿突然切进已经到中途的游戏，而且我还不能动。如果后续能有所改善，我会修改评价

This is a very fun game, but it has to be said that there are significant network issues. Not to mention frequent disconnections in games, what's even more serious is that I have started matching more than once and suddenly switched to a game that is already halfway through, and I can't move. If there is any improvement in the future, I will modify the evaluation

Na obecny czas w grze mam 20h i bawię się wyśmienicie, ale niestety produkcja ma wiele, ale to wiele niedociągnięć.
1) Częste ścinki - co mecz masz ściny co ok. 10/15 sek może więcej, co strasznie dekoncentruję i może nawet spowodować, że gra nie wykryje danej akcji. (Nie jest to wina mojego sprzętu)
2) W trakcie rozpoczęcia meczu zdarza się, że piłka respi się po złej stronie boiska i kiedy przegrana drużyna powinna zaczynać to zaczynają wygrani. Jeśli kojarzycie zasady wiecie o co "come on"
3) Niewidzialni ludzie - ostatnio natknąłem się na ten błąd i w trakcie meczu nie widziałem nic prócz przelatującej piłki
4) nwm jak i o co chodzi w tym błędzie, ale czasem bramkarz traci zdolności obronne
5) System wybijania piłki do dopracowania
6) Mało istotne ale błąd to błąd czasem nie widać w sklepie ubrań do kupienia
Czy polecił bym grę? Nie na czas obecny, najlepiej poczekajcie, aż naprawią błędy, bo za tą cenę serio jest ona mocno wygórowana, patrząc na samą rozgrywkę i to w jakim jest stanie.

Sinceramente, joguei Rematch nos dois betas e me apaixonei completamente pelo jogo, o problema é que terminou ai. Comprei o jogo na pré-venda, a versão base mesmo, achei os prêmios das versões melhores muito ruins e três dias não me importavam. Acordei hoje (19) insano para jogar, abri o jogo e me deparei com o prólogo, tudo bem, não é o melhor dos prólogos, mas era um tutorial muito melhor que sua versão anterior, fiquei animado que o jogo havia melhorado. 

Mas aí tudo começou, crashs, bugs, travamentos, desync. Tudo que tinha de problema no beta, que era de graça então eu relevava, se tornou um grandiosissimo problema no jogo LANÇADO. Me parece sinceramente que a SLOCLAP adiantou o lançamento do jogo sem este estar pelo menos aceitável. Queria poder dizer que sou um evento único e que ninguém mais relata esses problemas, mas aí, seria mentiroso, a verdade é que muita gente com PC melhor ou pior que o meu relata as mesmas coisas. 

Quem sabe no futuro o jogo melhora, é melhor a Sloclap correr atrás, porque definitivamente ela não é a EA que vende seu jogo mesmo sendo ruim, é uma empresa Indie. Já os havia achado muito arrogantes em posts passados pondo a culpa dos problemas e estabilidades na internet ou no computador dos jogadores, e bem, só provam meu ponto. Gosto do jogo e tentarei jogá-lo, mas sinceramente decepcionado.

EDIT: Bom, hoje dia 29/06 eu vim aqui para mudar um pouco as coisas. Ainda manterei minha recomendação como negativa, mas o jogo melhorou absurdamente. Não tive mais crash, apenas um mas foi culpa minha, o desync continua e muitos bugs, principalmente esse elástico ridículo. Mas, promissor, muita coisa melhorou.

EDIT2: Só quero ganhar minha medalha, indiquei esse jogo por falta de opção.
Enfin une nouvelle perspective sur le football, où on doit réfléchir aux défis plus micro de ce sport qui n'avait jusqu'ici qu'une approche "par équipe".

每当你永不独行的歌声响起就会有六万人的声浪将钢铁融化，在多特蒙德的南看台八万条黄色围巾组成的波浪正是鲁尔工业区最滚烫的心跳，阿根廷的拉普拉塔河边糖果盒球场用欢呼和呐喊堆砌成贫民窟的精神图腾，足球不仅仅是11人制的比赛还有街头足球它不仅是社区的呼吸更是城市的心跳，当一个只靠技术不靠数值的足球游戏一经发布就吸引了全世界球迷的目光。
本作玩法易学，但是难以上手。即使是多年FC玩家刚上手也得被暴虐一把！用失败来当养分汲取出更强大更全能的自己。
作为精简的足球游戏，它并不是传统的11人制。本作有着3v3/4v4/5v5三种比赛，新手更推荐3v3熟悉键位！最开始我一直习惯不了它的手柄键位。几千个小时的FC游玩让我把RT加速刻进了习惯我目前对那些对局印象深刻，我第一把就被打了一个4：0！属实接受不了，球传的非常不习惯。并且射门在以前的加速键，确实当时困扰到了我，所以我连跪了两把。后面发现我当门将还是挺好玩的，第一次操控门将这个位置，每一次神扑队友都会传来一句Nice属实是让我的自信心爆棚！我感觉我就跟德赫亚一样！每一次鱼跃扑救就跟艺术品一样优美，可惜门将这个位置是轮着来的。
https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3503376775 
那是我的第一把胜利，我5次扑救让球队以两球的优势赢下比赛，属实是成就感十足！连续扑出对面的单刀球，队友频频叫好，属实是挽狂澜于既倒，扶大厦之将倾啊！第三把开始我拿球开始不怵了！本作A就是盘带不需要在通过摇杆做出过人动作，RB＋A的跳球过人在面对门将的时候还可以直接把球过进去属实是戏耍对面了，我的第一粒进球是三人制，一次精彩的远射如帕瓦尔一样抽出一脚桃花陨落飞神剑球直挂死角，门将望球惊叹队友也为我送上了赞扬！
https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3503376754 
熟悉完键位之后，我就开始想要追求带队的胜利，进球不能满足我了，我不仅想要胜利也想要进球和助攻。在这期间遇到了很多队友，什么样的人都有！有老外开着麦克风让我pass the ball ！我一记大脚（没用大力要精准）皮球直接精准制导到了他的脚下，随后他轻轻的吃下这个送到脸上的饼，然后说了一句nice due！当然除了这两句，剩下的我都没听懂。
https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3503376727  
但是游戏里也不纯是好人。有疯狂搞队友心态的一个人，我传给他之后,他就疯狂的做花式动作？两个人来逼抢他，他也不把球传出来，这种人太独了，我不喜欢这种人。后面我就像徐庶进曹营一样，再也没有给这队友送上一脚传球，他当门将的时候也是摆烂球都不扑!每次就跟大爷一样按住摇杆要球，但是我的队友表现出色，我献上1球3助，他打进了4球（有一球是个人能力）那个独狼全程只有三次传球，还都是解围被拿到的被迫传球。当独狼进球的时候，我俩都是一言不发！最后5：2赢下了对局。
经过八小时的游玩，我也遇到了很多问题。例如我方或者是对面进球之后，正常来说应该是被进球一方来开球，但是有bug会让球出现在进球的那一方继续进行进攻回合，要是势均力敌还好，但凡是关键球，那可真是资本做局了啊！
由于游戏是刚发售目前还有网络问题。即使开了加速器有些对局依然存在卡顿瞬移的情况下，有时候我这边显示球过去了，准备打门的时候突然一瞬间球不见了！而我只能无奈顶着延迟回防，所以看到本文章的人不要压力我！确实是卡了。由于本作是3D的，所以在射门方面肯定是不然FC的！FC通过摇杆就能控制方向，而本作还得移动摇杆到指定视角射门要不然会射偏，习惯RT加速的经常失误也正常。
游戏目前的庆祝姿势也只有4个太少了，希望后续的更新能够出现更多的庆祝动作，例如梅西的双手指天和C罗的siu。
我还在商城还发现了足球精灵罗纳尔迪尼奥！确实是很还原，但是价格有点小贵！感觉未来更新真实球员都会要一两百来购买金币获取，但是我也看到很多帅帅的建模，例如蓝色监狱里的蜂乐回
还有千切豹马（本人不看蓝色监狱是因为发型熟悉短视频刷到过）这种自定义建模也赋予了玩家更大的创造力！看了11年球了玩足球游戏也有9年了！从小时候的梦幻足球联盟2016到FIFA22，也是第一次尝试3D足球游戏，希望后续的更新能够越来越好吧！我会给到本作8.5/10分。

[b]✅ Невероятно весело играть в паре с другом.[/b]

[b]Минусы:[/b]

It features 3x3, 4x4, and 5x5 matches. The random teammates are often completely clueless, but when you jump in with a friend, it’s an insanely fun experience.

[b]Pros:[/b]

[b]✅ Addictive 3x3, 4x4, and 5x5 football that keeps you hooked.[/b]

[b]✅ It's insanely fun to play in a duo with a friend.[/b]

[b]Cons:[/b]

[b]❌ Random teammates are often just terrible to play with.[/b]

[b]Verdict: 8.5/10. A hidden gem if you have a reliable partner.[/b]

Only really fun with friends, needs a lot more updates and polish.

I had high hopes for Rematch. The beta was a lot of fun despite its flaws, so I assumed those rough edges would be smoothed out in the full release. Unfortunately, not only do the issues remain, they feel even worse now.

Playing solo? You’ll probably have a great time. But if you plan on playing with friends, especially if you’re not all from the same country, prepare for frequent desync, constant frustration, and game-breaking bugs.

Some of the problems I’ve encountered regularly:

Desync when interrupting passes: I get points for the action, but the ball just goes right through.

As a goalkeeper, I’ve made clean saves only for the ball to go through into the net.

The ball gets stuck mid-play, then suddenly reappears in the enemy team’s possession.

Kickoffs being given to the wrong team.

Frequent crashes and server issues leading to lost games, especially in party play.

The core idea of the game is brilliant, and it's genuinely addicting when it works. But pushing a ranked mode when the online experience is this unstable for groups feels premature. Every other match with friends ends in frustration, not fun.

I want to love this game, and I’m sure it’ll improve over time. But right now, I simply can’t recommend it for anyone looking to play competitively with a group of friends.

update 1: latest update is a mess. movement feels sluggish, desync is worse, ping is way up and slide tackles now connect from either extraterrestrial ranges or not at all. if im not randomly disconnecting, its my teammates and sometimes controller doesnt work after reconnecting unless you close the game and restart again. goalkeeping still feels terrible if not worse. all issues previously noted are still in the game. battlepass being timegated is insane too. premium pass should allow you to bypass timegate. achievements and store are also constantly bugged since early access.

great game and concept. definitely needs polish. after about 70 hours total with it across beta and early access i have a list of things the game immediately needs to address.

netcode and desync needs work ASAP.
movement feels slightly janky. maybe im just weird.
game feels entirely different depending on ping. 30 feels great 60+ can be nightmarish.
goalkeeping is a jankfest.
sometimes it feels like the ball is passed or kicked without input, that might just be my controller but ive seen others say the same so idk.
sometimes the ball goes right through you. sometimes you can gain possession from 5 yards away.
game doesnt crash often but it happens.
starting to see some cheese moves involving self wall lobs.
store and cosmetics feel lackluster (cosmetics not a big deal(no bun?!) but cmon with the store).
passing NEEDS to be incentivized and rewarded WAY more. YOU ARE NOT ACTUALLY GAUCHO.
player review system would be nice along with a more fleshed out player card and statistics. we should be able to look at other peoples player card and stats also.
NEEDS clubs & crossplay ASAP.
ranked games and sometimes quickplay take way too long to find.
voice chat and mute buttons are janky as all hell.
no match history, replay system or spectator mode????(bold decision).
kickoffs are bugged often. wrong team gets ball or ball just sits mid.
NEEDS an "AVOID AS TEAMMATE" button EXPEDITIOUSLY.

these are just some things i have gripes with. yes, we all know the game launched today but theyve had months of people telling them about alot of these issues. 
launch could have been way smoother but even in its current state it has the makings of an excellent videogame and esport. one of the most enjoyable games ive played in the past decade, especially with friends. i wholly recommend it even if you dont like or watch soccer.

i will adjust this review accordingly and if you have any questions feel free to ask.
